summary: Frontend-only wedding invitation app tested end-to-end. All sections, navigation, countdown, mobile menu, and venue map work correctly. No critical bugs found.

issues: 'Jinkle&Yoshita' renders without spaces around the ampersand in the hero h1 (text content reads 'Jinkle&Yoshita') because the ampersand <span> has no whitespace around it; visually OK due to layout, but textContent has no spaces. Cosmetic/SEO consideration only.

action_items: (Optional) Suppress or fix Framer Motion useScroll warning: 'Please ensure that the container has a non-static position, like relative, fixed, or absolute to ensure scroll offset is calculated correctly.' Originates from Hero useScroll target ref; section element should have position relative (it does have `relative` class, but warning still appears at mount before layout). Low priority.
critical_code_review_comments: Hero.jsx countdown interval uses Date.now() each tick — fine, no leaks.
Nav.jsx scrollIntoView relies on native smooth scroll; works alongside Lenis. OK.
LocationMap iframe filter (invert+hue-rotate) styles the map nicely; loading=lazy used.
Footer: Contains stray reference to RSVP in venue 'Stay' tip body though task says RSVP NOT NEEDED — copy mentions 'shared upon RSVP'. Consider rewording.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified data-testids: hero-section, hero-couple-names, hero-countdown, countdown-{days|hours|minutes|seconds}, main-nav, nav-logo, nav-{label}-link x8 (story/journey/events/schedule/gallery/raw/gifts/venue), mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-menu, mobile-nav-{label}-link x8, events-section + event-{key} x5 (mehendi/haldi/sangeet/wedding/reception), schedule-section + schedule-{day-name} x4, our-journey-section + journey-item-{year} x5, gallery-curated-section + gallery-curated-{i}, gallery-raw-section + raw-photo-{i} x6, registry-section + registry-tile-{i} x3, location-section + venue-map (iframe inside) + directions-btn + venue-tip-{i} x3, footer-section + footer-map-link + back-to-top. Note event cards use `event-{key}` NOT `event-card-{i}`; gallery curated uses `gallery-curated-{i}` NOT `gallery-photo-{i}`.
validated_flows: Hero renders with 'Jinkle' and 'Yoshita', SAVE THE DATE label, '26 · November · 2026' date label, palace background image loads
Countdown shows Days/Hours/Minutes/Seconds; days=209 (correct for 26-Nov-2026 from now), seconds tick down every 1s (verified 04 -> 03)
Main nav has J & Y logo, '26 · 11 · 2026' tag, and exactly 8 anchor links
All 8 nav links scroll to their respective sections (#story #journey #events #schedule #gallery #raw #gifts #venue) — each section visible after click
Mobile viewport (375px): mobile-menu-toggle visible, opens fullscreen menu with 8 links, closes after click
5 event cards (mehendi, haldi, sangeet, wedding, reception)
Google Maps iframe loaded with src https://www.google.com/maps?q=Aashish+Vatika+Udaipur+Rajasthan&output=embed; Get Directions button has correct external URL
Footer 'Jinkle & Yoshita' large H2 renders; back-to-top button scrolls to top (scrollY=0)
All elements loaded successfully (0 broken images)
